case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ROSLEY M PETERSON

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSON, ROSLEY M SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-31-2020
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-27-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-28-2021 CONTINUED TO APR-26-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF COUNSEL RE: INTEREST, COSTS (CCP 1033), AND ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100129483) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-28-2021 CONTINUED TO DEC-28-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETERSON, ROSLEY M $9,493.78 PRINCIPAL, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,783.78, SEE SCANNED DOC
